# Feature Specification: Test Feature

**Branch**: test-branch-100
**Status**: Draft

## Summary
This is a test specification for E2E testing of the spec viewer feature.

## Requirements
- REQ-1: Test requirement one
- REQ-2: Another test requirement
- REQ-3: Third test requirement with more details

## Code Example

```typescript
const test = 'example';
console.log(test);

interface TestInterface {
  id: number;
  name: string;
}

function processTest(data: TestInterface): void {
  console.log('Processing:', data.name);
}
```

## Implementation Notes

This mock spec file is used for E2E testing to verify:
- Markdown rendering
- Syntax highlighting
- Scrollable content
- Modal display
